LEGAL_NOTICE.CONTENT_RESPONSIBLE: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV
LEGAL_NOTICE.DISCLAIMER_TEXT: The contents of these pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee that the content is correct, complete or up-to-date. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws in accordance with Section 7 Paragraph 1 TMG. However, according to Sections 8 to 10 TMG, as a service provider we are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
LEGAL_NOTICE.LINK_TEXT: This website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. We therefore cannot assume any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages. The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not apparent at the time of linking.
LEGAL_NOTICE.COPYRIGHT_TEXT: The content and works on these pages created by the site operator are subject to German copyright law.

PRIVACY_POLICY.INTRO_TEXT: Protecting your personal data is important to us...
PRIVACY_POLICY.COLLECTION_HEADER: Collection and Processing of Personal Data
PRIVACY_POLICY.COLLECTION_TEXT: We collect the following personal data when you send us a message via the contact form:
PRIVACY_POLICY.COLLECTION_CONTINUE: These data are used solely to respond to your inquiry.
PRIVACY_POLICY.CV_LOGIN_DATA_PROCESSING: When you log in to the protected CV area, we process the data you enter (name, company, role) and the login timestamp. The purpose is access protection as well as creating a security-relevant audit trail.
PRIVACY_POLICY.CV_LOGIN_COOKIES: Authentication is handled via an HTTP-only cookie named `cv_section_token` (JWT). This cookie is used exclusively for session management and is removed server-side when you log out.
PRIVACY_POLICY.CV_LOGIN_RETENTION: Login timestamps and related protocol information are automatically cleaned up after 30 days.
PRIVACY_POLICY.CV_LOGIN_ACCESS: Authorized administrators in the admin area can access the login logs. Manual deletion of logs is also an admin action.
PRIVACY_POLICY.CV_LOGIN_LEGAL_BASIS: Processing is based on our legitimate interests under Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (access protection, security and abuse prevention).
PRIVACY_POLICY.LEGAL_BASIS_TEXT: Processing is based on your consent (Art. 6 para. 1 lit. a GDPR)...
PRIVACY_POLICY.DISCLOSURE_TEXT: Your data will not be shared with third parties unless required by law...
PRIVACY_POLICY.THIRD_PARTY_TEXT: We use third-party services on our website to improve the user experience...
PRIVACY_POLICY.RIGHTS_TEXT: You have the right to obtain information about your stored data at any time...
PRIVACY_POLICY.SECURITY_TEXT: We use technical and organizational measures to protect your data...
PRIVACY_POLICY.COOKIES_TEXT: We do not use tracking technologies. For the protected CV area, an HTTP-only authentication cookie (`cv_section_token`) is used for session management.
PRIVACY_POLICY.CONTACT_TEXT: If you have questions about data protection...

WORK_TOGETHER.ABOUT_ME1: I enjoy creating user-friendly frontend solutions. I quickly learn new frameworks and apply them effectively in my projects.
WORK_TOGETHER.ABOUT_ME2: Whether in a team or remote, I always work efficiently. With creative ideas and solution-oriented thinking, I develop interfaces that are both functional and visually appealing.

MY_WORK.DESCRIPTION: Discover a selection of my work – interact with projects to see my skills in action.

JOIN.DESCRIPTION: Task manager inspired by the Kanban system. Create and organize tasks using drag-and-drop and assign users and categories.

POLLO.DESCRIPTION: Jump’n’Run game with throwing mechanics. Help Pepe collect coins and Tabasco to fight the crazy chicken.

POKEDEX.DESCRIPTION: Based on the PokéAPI – a simple library to display and catalog Pokémon data.

REF_SECTION.COLLEAGUES: This is what my colleagues say about our collaboration:

CATALINA.COMMIT: Jenny and I worked together on the Kochwelt project. I was positively impressed by her independent work style as well as her friendly and helpful nature. She brought strong frontend skills to the table and was always eager to learn new things. I would gladly work with Jenny again anytime.

CARYEN.COMMIT: Jenny carried out all tasks entrusted to her with great reliability and care. Her strong determination, deep interest, and remarkable diligence stood out. Working with her was extremely pleasant and enriching. I am confident that she will be a valuable asset in any future project as well.

PATRICK.COMMIT: Jennifer was very independent and always focused – while bringing just the right touch of humor. The atmosphere within the team was relaxed and warm, which made working together truly enjoyable.

STEPHIE.COMMIT: Jenny brought an incredible amount of joy and positive energy to the project. She was always reliable and enriched the team with her open and approachable nature. What impressed me most was how often she helped us move forward with fresh, unconventional ideas whenever we were stuck on a challenge. Her support was consistently dependable and motivating. Working with Jenny was truly a pleasure – thank you!

JON.COMMIT: Jennifer Thomas was a great asset to our final project at the Developer Akademie. She quickly found her footing, demonstrated strong technical skills, asked insightful questions, and maintained a clear overview even in challenging situations. Her positive attitude, sense of humor, and clear communication made her a highly valued team member. A wholehearted recommendation – both professionally and personally.

CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Passionate and creative Frontend Developer specializing in modern web applications. Expert in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with a strong focus on Angular to craft interactive and responsive user experiences. Next goal: Expanding my expertise into app development to build cross-platform solutions

CV_SECTION.DOC_CERT_INTRO_P1: This document confirms the successful completion of training as a front-end developer at Developer Akademie GmbH.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_ABOUT_P1: As a front-end developer focused on modern web applications, I combine clear code structure with user-friendly interfaces. In projects such as my Angular Kanban board, the JavaScript game “El Pollo Loco”, and the PokéAPI-based Pokédex app, I deliberately plan components, state, and data flow so new features integrate cleanly and stay maintainable.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_ABOUT_P2: I enjoy working in a structured way and in close alignment with the team: before I write code, I clarify requirements and domain, sketch architecture ideas, and use modern developer tooling to compare options. Debugging with browser dev tools, sensible error handling, and repeatable browser testing are a natural part of my workflow.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_SKILLS_L5: Unit and browser tests (Jasmine/Karma, manual E2E checks)
CV_SECTION.RESUME_WORKSTYLE_L1: Architecture thinking for components, state, and data flow
CV_SECTION.RESUME_WORKSTYLE_L2: Clarity before code: requirements and use cases first
CV_SECTION.RESUME_WORKSTYLE_L3: Targeted use of modern developer tools and assistants
CV_SECTION.RESUME_WORKSTYLE_L4: Debugging focus and clean error handling
CV_SECTION.RESUME_JUNIOR_L1: Built the Kanban task manager “Join” with Angular, TypeScript, and Firebase.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_JUNIOR_L2: Implemented a 2D jump-’n’-run game “El Pollo Loco” with object-oriented JavaScript.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_JUNIOR_L3: Built a Pokédex single-page app on top of the PokéAPI.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_JUNIOR_L4: Created and maintain the Angular portfolio front end.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_EDU_DEGREE_DESC: Developer Akademie GmbH · Munich/remote — completed successfully with a graduation certificate.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_PROJ_JOIN_DESC: Team-based task manager with drag-and-drop board, assignees, and categories. Focus on component architecture, form logic, and cloud backend integration.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_PROJ_POLLO_DESC: Side-scrolling jump-’n’-run with a game loop, animations, collision detection, and keyboard controls. Strengthens my ability to structure complex browser-side logic.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_PROJ_POKEDEX_DESC: List and detail views for Pokémon data with search and loading states. Practice in API integration, error handling, and responsive UI design.

CV_SECTION.RESUME_WG02_P: Prepared traffic signing plans per RSA 21 and applied for traffic orders (VAO).
CV_SECTION.RESUME_WG03_P: Work across all areas of the trade.
CV_SECTION.RESUME_WG04_P: Installation of PV systems including maintenance.
